hero.headline: Film your flat.
hero.subheadline: Phone video in · Photorealistic 3D model out · 48 hours
hero.body: No photographer. No crew. No special equipment. Walk through your property with your phone — we turn it into a 3D tour your buyers can explore from anywhere in the world.
hero.click_hint: Move to look around · Scroll to continue

services.title: What We Build
services.subtitle: Send us a phone video. Get a 3D model back.
services.3d_desc: Film your flat or villa with your phone and send us the footage. We reconstruct it into a photorealistic 3D model — no photographer visit, no special camera, no delay.
services.3d_feature2: Buyers explore every room, on any device
services.vr_desc: The same 3D model, experienced in full immersion. On a phone, a laptop, or a headset — buyers feel the space as if they're already standing in it.
services.video_desc: A 60-second reel cut from your 3D model — golden-hour framing, sweeping interiors, formatted for Instagram, YouTube, and WhatsApp.

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: Four steps. 48 hours. No visit needed.
process.step1_desc: Walk through your property with your phone — any iPhone or Android. A 10-minute handheld walkthrough is all we need. We'll send you a quick filming guide.
process.step2_desc: Upload your video to Google Drive or WhatsApp. No account needed. We confirm receipt within 1 hour and begin processing immediately.
process.step3_desc: Our 3DGS pipeline reconstructs every frame into a photorealistic 3D model. We add your branding, room labels, and floor layout. Ready in 24–48 hours.
process.step4_desc: A shareable link lands in your WhatsApp. Buyers explore your property in full 3D — on any device, from anywhere in the world.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden costs. No surprises. Pay only for what you need.
pricing.currency_note: All prices in INR. USD equivalent shown in brackets.
pricing.darshana_f2: Experience on any device — phone, laptop or headset

testimonials.title: What Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real results from real estate professionals across India
testimonials.t1_text: The virtual tour doubled our site visit conversions. Buyers were pre-sold before they even arrived. Drishya's work is worth every rupee.
testimonials.t2_text: I've sold properties across India for 12 years. This is the first time technology genuinely gave me an edge. The virtual experience wowed my NRI clients.
testimonials.t3_text: The Sampurna package covered everything — virtual tour, VR experience and the cinematic reel. We used it across Instagram, our website and WhatsApp. Outstanding ROI.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting
faq.q1: Do I need a special camera or equipment?
faq.a1: No. Any modern smartphone — iPhone or Android — is all you need. We'll send you a simple filming guide. Most properties take 10–15 minutes to film.
faq.q2: How long does it take to deliver?
faq.a2: Once we receive your video, the 3D model is ready in 24–48 hours. Express same-day delivery is available for urgent listings.
faq.q3: Which types of properties do you work with?
faq.a3: Any residential or commercial property — independent houses, villas, apartments, gated communities, commercial plots, and under-construction projects.
faq.q4: Do buyers need a VR headset?
faq.a4: No. The 3D tour works in any browser on mobile or desktop. A VR headset gives a more immersive experience but is entirely optional.
faq.q5: Can I share the 3D tour on WhatsApp?
faq.a5: Yes — every project includes a short, mobile-optimised link you can share directly on WhatsApp, social media, or embed on your website.
faq.q6: Do you cover areas outside Guntur?
faq.a6: Since you do the filming, we can work with any property in India. No visit needed from our side.
faq.q7: Is the pricing negotiable for multiple properties?
faq.a7: Yes. We offer tiered discounts for 3+ properties and monthly retainer contracts. Contact us to discuss a custom arrangement.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: When you fill in our contact form, we collect your name, WhatsApp number, city, and property details. This information is submitted directly to us via WhatsApp and is not stored on our servers.
privacy.s2_body: Your details are used solely to respond to your enquiry, provide quotes, and deliver the services you request. We do not sell, rent, or share your information with third parties.
privacy.s3_body: Our contact form opens WhatsApp with your details pre-filled. By submitting, you consent to this message being sent via WhatsApp (Meta Platforms, Inc.). WhatsApp's own privacy policy applies to messages sent on their platform.
privacy.s4_body: We use only essential browser storage (localStorage) to remember your theme and language preference. No tracking cookies, no analytics.
privacy.s5_body: For any privacy questions, message us on WhatsApp or email us at hello@drishyam.in

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: Drishya provides 3D virtual tours, VR experiences, and cinematic video production for real estate properties. All services are subject to a written agreement or WhatsApp confirmation before work begins.
terms.s2_body: 50% advance payment is required before the capture visit. The remaining 50% is due before delivery of final assets. All prices are in INR. Custom projects require a signed scope document.
terms.s3_body: Sparsha package includes 1 revision. Darshana and Sampurna packages include unlimited revisions within 30 days of delivery. Revisions are changes to colour grading, framing, or labels — not re-captures.
terms.s4_body: Hosted links are active for the period specified in your package. After expiry, assets are archived for 60 days before deletion. Extended hosting is available at ₹3,000/year.
terms.s5_body: Cancellations before the capture visit receive a full refund of the advance. Cancellations after the visit forfeit the advance payment. Completed work is non-refundable.
terms.s6_body: Drishya is not liable for delays caused by property access issues, adverse weather, or client unavailability. Our total liability is limited to the amount paid for the specific project.
